headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -14.2)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 45% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 142 quotes and 94 at strong intensity, driving a solid score of 30.5 — people are venting with real force today.
• Despite the high quote count and strong intensity, the score sits in the lower half of its 185-day range (−0.5 to 171.6), suggesting this is a moderately active day by historical standards.
• Frustrations eased sharply from yesterday's 71.3, while Optimism and Fears both turned more negative — the overall mood has cooled and soured slightly heading into today.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
